title: AI Summary Agent
description: Build an AI agent that summarizes text. Define a Summarizer agent with a system prompt. POST /api/summarize receives { text } and returns a summary from the agent. The agent should return a structured response with 'summary' and 'key_points' fields.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

# Define a Summarizer agent
# POST /api/summarize endpoint that uses the agent

body.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This is a test of the summarization system.
